scripts.build: npm run build:contracts && npm run build:shared && npm run build:renderer && npm run build:editor && npm run build:extensions && npm run build:client && npm run build:lander && npm run build:examples
scripts.build:contracts: npm run build -w @markdown-workspace/extension-manifest && npm run build -w @markdown-workspace/theme-contract && npm run build -w @markdown-workspace/extension-host
scripts.build:client: npm run build:shared && npm run build:renderer && npm run build:editor && npm run build:extensions && npm run build -w apps/client
scripts.build:client:lib: npm run build:shared && npm run build:renderer && npm run build:editor && npm run build:extensions && npm run build:lib -w apps/client
scripts.build:lander: npm run build:shared && npm run build:renderer && npm run build -w apps/lander
scripts.test: npm run test:contracts && npm run test:shared && npm run test:renderer && npm run test:editor && npm run test:extensions && npm run test:client
scripts.test:contracts: npm run test -w @markdown-workspace/extension-manifest && npm run test -w @markdown-workspace/theme-contract && npm run test -w @markdown-workspace/extension-host
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:contracts && npm run typecheck:shared && npm run typecheck:renderer && npm run typecheck:editor && npm run typecheck:extensions && npm run typecheck:client && npm run typecheck:lander && npm run typecheck:examples
scripts.typecheck:contracts: npm run typecheck -w @markdown-workspace/extension-manifest && npm run typecheck -w @markdown-workspace/theme-contract && npm run typecheck -w @markdown-workspace/extension-host
scripts.lint: npm run lint:contracts && npm run lint:shared && npm run lint:renderer && npm run lint:editor && npm run lint:extensions && npm run lint:client && npm run lint:lander && npm run lint:examples
scripts.lint:contracts: npm run lint -w @markdown-workspace/extension-manifest && npm run lint -w @markdown-workspace/theme-contract && npm run lint -w @markdown-workspace/extension-host
scripts.build:shared: npm run build -w @markdown-workspace/ui-tokens && npm run build -w @markdown-workspace/icons && npm run build -w @markdown-workspace/i18n && npm run build -w @markdown-workspace/testing
scripts.test:shared: npm run test -w @markdown-workspace/ui-tokens && npm run test -w @markdown-workspace/icons && npm run test -w @markdown-workspace/i18n && npm run test -w @markdown-workspace/testing
scripts.typecheck:shared: npm run typecheck -w @markdown-workspace/ui-tokens && npm run typecheck -w @markdown-workspace/icons && npm run typecheck -w @markdown-workspace/i18n && npm run typecheck -w @markdown-workspace/testing
scripts.lint:shared: npm run lint -w @markdown-workspace/ui-tokens && npm run lint -w @markdown-workspace/icons && npm run lint -w @markdown-workspace/i18n && npm run lint -w @markdown-workspace/testing
scripts.build:renderer: npm run build -w @markdown-workspace/markdown-renderer-core && npm run build -w @markdown-workspace/markdown-renderer-react
scripts.test:renderer: npm run test -w @markdown-workspace/markdown-renderer-core && npm run test -w @markdown-workspace/markdown-renderer-react
scripts.typecheck:renderer: npm run typecheck -w @markdown-workspace/markdown-renderer-core && npm run typecheck -w @markdown-workspace/markdown-renderer-react
scripts.lint:renderer: npm run lint -w @markdown-workspace/markdown-renderer-core && npm run lint -w @markdown-workspace/markdown-renderer-react
scripts.build:examples: npm run build:example:renderer-basic && npm run build:example:editor-basic
scripts.typecheck:examples: npm run typecheck -w @markdown-workspace/example-renderer-basic && npm run typecheck -w @markdown-workspace/example-editor-basic
scripts.lint:examples: npm run lint -w @markdown-workspace/example-renderer-basic && npm run lint -w @markdown-workspace/example-editor-basic
scripts.build:editor: npm run build -w @markdown-workspace/markdown-editor-core && npm run build -w @markdown-workspace/markdown-editor-react
scripts.test:editor: npm run test -w @markdown-workspace/markdown-editor-core && npm run test -w @markdown-workspace/markdown-editor-react
scripts.typecheck:editor: npm run typecheck -w @markdown-workspace/markdown-editor-core && npm run typecheck -w @markdown-workspace/markdown-editor-react
scripts.lint:editor: npm run lint -w @markdown-workspace/markdown-editor-core && npm run lint -w @markdown-workspace/markdown-editor-react
scripts.build:extensions: npm run build -w @markdown-workspace/extension-runtime && npm run build -w @markdown-workspace/extension-manager && npm run build -w @markdown-workspace/extension-gemini-agent && npm run build -w @markdown-workspace/extension-theme-studio && npm run build -w @demo-markdown-workspace/extension-catalog-hello
scripts.test:extensions: npm run test -w @markdown-workspace/extension-runtime && npm run test -w @markdown-workspace/extension-manager && npm run test -w @markdown-workspace/extension-gemini-agent && npm run test -w @markdown-workspace/extension-theme-studio && npm run test -w @demo-markdown-workspace/extension-catalog-hello
scripts.typecheck:extensions: npm run typecheck -w @markdown-workspace/extension-runtime && npm run typecheck -w @markdown-workspace/extension-manager && npm run typecheck -w @markdown-workspace/extension-gemini-agent && npm run typecheck -w @markdown-workspace/extension-theme-studio && npm run typecheck -w @demo-markdown-workspace/extension-catalog-hello
scripts.lint:extensions: npm run lint -w @markdown-workspace/extension-runtime && npm run lint -w @markdown-workspace/extension-manager && npm run lint -w @markdown-workspace/extension-gemini-agent && npm run lint -w @markdown-workspace/extension-theme-studio && npm run lint -w @demo-markdown-workspace/extension-catalog-hello
scripts.ci:test: npm run test && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e && npm run test:visual
scripts.ci:workspace:verify: npm run ci:lint && npm run ci:typecheck && npm run ci:build && npm run ci:test && npm run conformance
scripts.ci:workspace:verify:publish: npm run ci:lint && npm run ci:typecheck && npm run ci:build && npm run conformance
scripts.conformance: npm run validate:manifests && npm run validate:compatibility && npm run validate:boundaries && npm run validate:exports && npm run extension:bundle && npm run extension:sign && npm run validate:extension-artifacts && node ./tools/conformance/generate-conformance-artifacts.mjs
scripts.publish:extensions: npm run build:extensions && npm run extension:bundle && npm run extension:sign
scripts.release:prepare: npm run pack:packages && npm run publish:extensions && npm run conformance && npm run release:evidence
